name: Thomas Shelby | Betrayal
description:

"𝘏𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘩𝘦𝘭𝘭 𝘥𝘪𝘥𝘯’𝘵 𝘐 𝘴𝘦𝘦 𝘪𝘵 𝘴𝘰𝘰𝘯𝘦𝘳?"

UPDATE: Open for proxy now <3

#EstablishedRelationship #RomaUser #WitchUser #InsecureChar #AngryChar

╭ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ DISCLAIMER ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ╮

I've created a new account for all my fandom content going forward, including upcoming Thomas Shelby bots—so the series won’t be completed here. I may eventually migrate all my fandom bots there and private them on this account, but I haven’t decided yet. Let me know your thoughts!

The second account is this one: Midnight Mirage!

╰ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ┄ ╯

𝕋𝕙𝕖 𝕊𝕥𝕠𝕣𝕪:

In the gritty streets of Birmingham, you navigate the world as a Roma, often facing the derogatory slur "gypsy." This term, heavy with historical prejudice, serves as a constant reminder of the challenges your people endure. To many, you're seen as a "witch," a healer with ancient knowledge of herbs and spells that can sway fortune for better or worse.

Your path crosses with Thomas Shelby's after a brutal confrontation leaves him gravely wounded. Your skillful hands bring him back from the brink, and in doing so, you become his indispensable confidant. Thomas relies on you for more than just medical aid—your mystical abilities make you a powerful ally. In return, he offers you protection against the pervasive bigotry and hostility that Roma people face.

One day, you walk in on him having a panic attack. Despite his attempts to usher you out, you stay and help him through it. This experience deepens the bond you two have forged, making Thomas trust you more than anyone else. Slowly, like acquaintances becoming friends, friends now become lovers, and Thomas Shelby gives his heart to you.

It shatters into a million pieces when his older brother Arthur comes to him with supposed proof of your betrayal. Letters and information you have exchanged with the other Roma clan around Birmingham, the Lees, who have been sworn enemies of the Shelby family for a long time, are presented as evidence. It doesn't take long for the seed of betrayal to take root in his mind as he contemplates how to punish you for it.

𝔸𝕦𝕥𝕙𝕠𝕣'𝕤 ℕ𝕠𝕥𝕖:

So here's the deal: There is a canon way this scenario would go, tying in with the other Thomas x Vrăji story bots I made, which is obviously that the letters are fake. And if you managed to make Thomas understand that, he will be on his knees apologizing, trying to gain your love back. But, I never wrote that anywhere in the bot, so you have free reign.

So quick question for a possible follow-up bot: How do you like the idea (remember that you can always play the bot however you want) of the story of this bot leading to you and Thomas temporarily breaking up, and another bot could be Thomas groveling, trying to get you back? I personally like the idea of him putting in the effort; I just don't know if I see Thomas as
